CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleButtonClickEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local Entity = event.Entity local itemName = Entity.UIItemSlot.item.Name
if itemName == "나뭇가지" then _UserService.LocalPlayer.CostumeManagerComponent.CustomOneHandedWeaponEquip = "aaa06888cfc24381aea4719918115a46" end
self.Entity:Destroy()
